series_metadata.series_description: Contracts for goods and services, temporary personnel, purchase orders and all related documentation that includes Request for proposal, invitation to bid and other encumbrances.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Contracts for goods, retain in the Contracts Unit of Legal Division for 5 years after the contract expires, then destroy. For services retain in the Contracts Unit of Legal Division for 5 years after the contract expires, then transfer to offsite storage for an additional 11 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Contracts for goods, retain in the Contracts Unit of Legal Division for 5 years after the contract expires, then destroy. For services retain in the Contracts Unit of Legal Division for 16 years after the contract expires, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
